sourceRef.citation: Fajer Mohammed Z Alqahtani et al. 2027

statement.en: Simulation and measurement of particle therapy beams with a silicon-based detection system

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document dated 2026-04-25 is a future date (posterior to current knowledge cutoff April 2024). The axiom concerns simulation/measurement methods for particle therapy using silicon detectors—a legitimate technical domain. However, classification is provisional because: (1) the document does not yet exist in accessible form; (2) claims cannot be empirically verified against the stated future date; (3) categorization as 'cs.AI' for a physics/medical physics paper suggests either miscategorization or novel AI-centric methodology not yet validated. FLOWING reflects pre-publication, pre-validation status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 珪素の結晶が粒子の軌跡を光に変え、エネルギーと距離の対話が治療の真実を映す。
